# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud network security.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
    MyVpc:
        Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::VPC
        Properties: 
            CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16" # Change this to your desired VPC's cidr block, e.g., '172.31.0.0/16', etc...
    
    PublicSubnetA: 
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:  
            CidrBlock: "10.0.4.0/24" # Change this to your desired public subnets cidr block, e.g., '172.31.5.0/24', etc... 
    
    PublicSubnetB:  
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:     
            CidrBlock: "10.0.8.0/24" # Change this to your desired public subnets cidr block, e.g., '172.31.9.0/24', etc... 
    
    PrivateSubnetA:  
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:     
            CidrBlock: "10.0.5.0/24" # Change this to your desired private subnets cidr block, e.g., '172.31.6.0/24', etc... 
    
    PrivateSubnetB:  
        Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Subnet
        Properties:     
            CidrBlock: "10.0.9.0/24" # Change this to your desired private subnets cidr block, e.g., '172.31.10.0/24', etc... 
    
    InternetGatewayEC2InstanceLaunch:  
        Type : AWS::EC2::InternetGatewayAndVPNConnection :: VPCPEGWTransitGatewayAttachment, VPNConnections and other resources are not supported in CloudFormation yet. You can use the 'AWS::Route53' resource for DNS settings if you want to have a more dynamic setup
        Properties: 
            InternetGatewayId : !GetAtt MyVpcInternetGateway .Id,   # Get Attachment Reference of VPC GateWay.
